name: pawtrace
description: PawTrace monorepo：React+TS 前端 + Express+Prisma+Postgres 后端

scripts.stop: pkill -f "node dist/index.js" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "vite --port 5173" 2>/dev/null || true; npm run db:local:stop
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.local:prepare: npm run db:local:start && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local
scripts.local:dev: npm run local:prepare && npm run dev
